title: Marketplace Manager - Pepperfry - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Pepperfry - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Pepperfry:
Pepperfry is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry!
